author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for converting the std::thread::sleep blocking wait in src/subagent.rs:1407-1414 (execute_agent_output_tool block path) to an async path (tokio::time::sleep) so we don't park a tokio worker for 5 minutes / deadlock current_thread runtime. Per the 2026-05-20 result comment, src/subagent.rs is in the forbidden-files list for the recent bulk fix; the std::thread::sleep at src/subagent.rs:1681 cannot be touched from that session. Real bug — should be revisited in a future change-set that includes subagent.rs in scope.
